*.name: Resource names must not be placeholder identifiers
Resource blocks are better placed in a descriptively named file than main.tf
Resource labels must not repeat the resource type
lifecycle ignore_changes must not use the all keyword
terraform.workspace must not be used in resource configuration
count.index must not appear in resource name attributes

aws_acm_certificate.name: ACM certificates must have certificate transparency logging enabled

aws_alb.name: ALBs must drop invalid HTTP header fields
Load balancers must have access logging enabled
Application Load Balancers must have deletion protection enabled

aws_alb_listener.name: ALB HTTP listeners must redirect to HTTPS

aws_api_gateway_domain_name.name: API Gateway custom domain names must enforce TLS 1.2

aws_api_gateway_method.name: API Gateway methods must require authorisation

aws_api_gateway_stage.name: API Gateway (v1) stages must have access logging enabled
API Gateway stages must enable X-Ray tracing

aws_apigatewayv2_stage.name: API Gateway v2 stages must have access logging enabled

aws_appsync_graphql_api.name: AppSync GraphQL APIs must have CloudWatch logging enabled

aws_athena_workgroup.name: Athena workgroups must have encryption configured for query results
Athena workgroups must enforce workgroup configuration

aws_autoscaling_group.name: Auto Scaling groups must be deployed in VPC subnets
Auto Scaling Groups must not use $Latest launch template version

aws_backup_vault.name: Backup vaults must use a customer-managed KMS key
Backup vaults should have a vault lock configuration

aws_cloudfront_distribution.name: CloudFront distributions must redirect HTTP to HTTPS
CloudFront distributions must have WAF enabled
CloudFront distributions should not use PriceClass_All unless global reach is required
CloudFront distributions must have access logging enabled

aws_cloudtrail.name: CloudTrail must have log file validation enabled
CloudTrail must capture global service events
S3 buckets used for CloudTrail logs must have access logging enabled
CloudTrail must have event selectors configured for data event logging
CloudTrail trails must send logs to CloudWatch Logs

aws_cloudwatch_log_group.name: CloudWatch log groups must have a retention period configured
CloudWatch log groups must be encrypted with a KMS key
CloudWatch log groups should have a retention period set

aws_cloudwatch_log_metric_filter.name: CloudWatch metric filter must detect unauthorized API calls (CIS 3.1)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect console sign-in without MFA (CIS 3.2)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect root account usage (CIS 3.3)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect IAM policy changes (CIS 3.4)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect CloudTrail configuration changes (CIS 3.5)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect AWS Management Console authentication failures (CIS 3.6)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect disabling or deletion of KMS CMKs (CIS 3.7)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect S3 bucket policy changes (CIS 3.8)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect AWS Config configuration changes (CIS 3.9)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect security group changes (CIS 3.10)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect Network ACL changes (CIS 3.11)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect network gateway changes (CIS 3.12)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect route table changes (CIS 3.13)
CloudWatch metric filter must detect VPC changes (CIS 3.14)

aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm.name: CloudWatch alarms must have actions enabled
CloudWatch alarms must have at least one alarm action configured

aws_codebuild_project.name: CodeBuild projects must use a customer-managed KMS encryption key
CodeBuild projects must have CloudWatch logging enabled
CodeBuild projects should not run in privileged mode
CodeBuild build timeout should not exceed 30 minutes
CodeBuild projects should not use the largest compute type without justification

aws_codepipeline.name: CodePipeline artifact store should use a customer-managed KMS key

aws_cognito_user_pool.name: Cognito user pools must require MFA
Cognito user pool password must be at least 8 characters
Cognito user pools must enable advanced security

aws_config_configuration_recorder.name: AWS Config recorder must capture all supported resource types

aws_config_configuration_recorder_status.name: AWS Config recording must be enabled

aws_dax_cluster.name: DAX clusters must have server-side encryption enabled
DAX cluster endpoints must require TLS

aws_db_instance.name: RDS instances must be Multi-AZ for high availability
RDS instances must enable automatic minor version upgrades
RDS instances and clusters should use IAM database authentication
RDS instances must not be publicly accessible
RDS instances and clusters must have deletion protection enabled
RDS instances must have automated backups enabled with sufficient retention
RDS instances should be deployed across multiple availability zones
RDS instances should allow automatic minor version upgrades
RDS instances should enable storage autoscaling
RDS instances must have enhanced monitoring enabled
RDS instances must have Performance Insights enabled
RDS, Aurora, DocumentDB, and Neptune clusters must encrypt storage at rest
RDS instances must export logs to CloudWatch

aws_db_security_group.name: aws_db_security_group is deprecated — use VPC security groups

aws_default_vpc.name: Default VPC must not be used

aws_docdb_cluster.name: RDS, Aurora, DocumentDB, and Neptune clusters must encrypt storage at rest
DocumentDB clusters must export logs to CloudWatch

aws_dynamodb_table.name: DynamoDB point-in-time recovery must be enabled
DynamoDB tables must have point-in-time recovery enabled

aws_ebs_encryption_by_default.name: EC2 EBS encryption by default must be enabled at the account level

aws_ebs_volume.name: EBS volumes should use gp3 instead of gp2

aws_ecr_repository.name: ECR repositories must scan images on push
ECR repositories must enforce image tag immutability
ECR repositories must have a lifecycle policy

aws_ecs_cluster.name: ECS clusters must not disable exec command logging

aws_ecs_service.name: ECS services must not assign public IP addresses automatically
ECS Fargate services must use the latest Fargate platform version

aws_ecs_task_definition.name: Containers must not run as privileged
ECS task definition containers must use a read-only root filesystem
ECS task definitions must not use host networking
ECS task definitions must not share the host PID namespace
ECS task definitions must not share the host IPC namespace

aws_efs_access_point.name: EFS access points must specify a POSIX user identity

aws_eip.name: Elastic IPs should be associated with an instance or network interface
aws_eip vpc argument is deprecated — argument must be absent

aws_eks_cluster.name: EKS clusters must have secrets encryption configured
EKS cluster API endpoint must have private access enabled
EKS cluster API endpoint must not be publicly accessible
EKS clusters must have control plane logging enabled

aws_elasticache_replication_group.name: ElastiCache encryption at rest must be enabled
ElastiCache encryption in transit must be enabled
ElastiCache replication groups must enable at-rest encryption
ElastiCache replication groups must enable in-transit encryption
ElastiCache replication groups should require an auth token
ElastiCache replication groups must enable Multi-AZ
ElastiCache replication groups must retain snapshots for at least one day

aws_elasticache_security_group.name: aws_elasticache_security_group is deprecated — use VPC security groups

aws_elasticsearch_domain.name: Elasticsearch/OpenSearch node-to-node encryption must be enabled
Elasticsearch/OpenSearch domains must be deployed in a VPC

aws_emr_block_public_access_configuratio.name: EMR must be configured to block public access at the account level

aws_emr_cluster.name: EMR clusters must attach a security configuration

aws_flow_log.name: VPC flow logs must capture all traffic

aws_fsx_lustre_file_system.name: FSx for Lustre must use a customer-managed KMS key

aws_fsx_windows_file_system.name: FSx for Windows File Server must use a customer-managed KMS key

aws_glue_crawler.name: Glue crawlers must have a security configuration set

aws_glue_data_catalog_encryption_setting.name: Glue Data Catalog connection passwords must be encrypted

aws_glue_job.name: Glue jobs must have a security configuration set

aws_iam_access_key.name: IAM root user must not have access keys

aws_iam_account_password_policy.name: IAM password policy must enforce complexity and expiry
IAM password expiry must be 90 days or less
IAM password reuse prevention must be at least 5

aws_iam_group_policy_attachment.name: IAM principals must not be granted the AWS AdministratorAccess policy

aws_iam_policy_attachment.name: aws_iam_policy_attachment exclusively manages attachments — use targeted attachment resources

aws_iam_role.name: IAM role maximum session duration must not exceed 12 hours
IAM principals must not be granted the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
IAM roles must not have AdministratorAccess attached

aws_iam_role_policy_attachment.name: IAM principals must not be granted the AWS AdministratorAccess policy

aws_iam_user.name: IAM users must not be created directly; use roles or SSO instead

aws_iam_user_policy_attachment.name: IAM principals must not be granted the AWS AdministratorAccess policy

aws_instance.name: EC2 instances must not have public IPs assigned automatically
EC2 detailed monitoring must be enabled
EC2 instances must have termination protection enabled

aws_kinesis_firehose_delivery_stream.name: Kinesis Firehose delivery streams must have server-side encryption enabled

aws_kinesis_stream.name: Kinesis streams must use KMS server-side encryption

aws_kms_key.name: KMS keys must have a deletion window of at least 7 days

aws_lambda_function.name: Lambda functions must have X-Ray tracing enabled
Lambda functions should run inside a VPC
Lambda functions must use a KMS key to encrypt environment variables
Lambda functions should configure a dead-letter queue
Lambda functions should have X-Ray active tracing enabled
Lambda functions should not use the maximum memory allocation without justification
Lambda functions must have a concurrent execution limit configured
Lambda functions must not use deprecated runtimes
Lambda functions must have code signing configured

aws_lambda_function_url.name: Lambda function URLs must require authentication

aws_lambda_permission.name: Lambda function permissions must not allow public invocation

aws_launch_template.name: EC2 instances must not have public IPs assigned automatically
EC2 launch templates must set IMDS hop limit to 1

aws_lb.name: ALBs must drop invalid HTTP header fields
Load balancers must have access logging enabled
Application Load Balancers must have deletion protection enabled

aws_lb_listener.name: ALB HTTP listeners must redirect to HTTPS

aws_mq_broker.name: MQ brokers must not be publicly accessible
MQ brokers must have audit logging enabled

aws_msk_cluster.name: MSK clusters must enforce TLS for in-transit encryption
MSK clusters must have broker logging configured
MSK clusters must use a customer-managed KMS key for encryption at rest
MSK clusters must encrypt broker-to-broker communication

aws_nat_gateway.name: Multiple NAT gateways should be used only when cross-AZ resilience is required

aws_neptune_cluster.name: RDS, Aurora, DocumentDB, and Neptune clusters must encrypt storage at rest
Neptune clusters must have deletion protection enabled
Neptune clusters must retain automated backups for at least 7 days
Neptune clusters must enable IAM database authentication

aws_opensearch_domain.name: Elasticsearch/OpenSearch node-to-node encryption must be enabled
Elasticsearch/OpenSearch domains must be deployed in a VPC

aws_qldb_ledger.name: QLDB ledgers must have deletion protection enabled

aws_rds_cluster.name: RDS instances and clusters should use IAM database authentication
RDS instances and clusters must have deletion protection enabled
RDS instances must have automated backups enabled with sufficient retention
RDS, Aurora, DocumentDB, and Neptune clusters must encrypt storage at rest

aws_rds_instance.name: RDS instances must be Multi-AZ for high availability
RDS instances must enable automatic minor version upgrades
RDS instances must not be publicly accessible

aws_redshift_cluster.name: Redshift clusters must not be publicly accessible
Redshift clusters must have audit logging enabled
Redshift clusters must allow automatic version upgrades

aws_redshift_security_group.name: aws_redshift_security_group is deprecated — use VPC security groups

aws_route53_zone.name: Route53 hosted zones should enable DNSSEC signing

aws_s3_bucket.name: S3 buckets must have an aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block resource
S3 buckets must have an aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration resource
S3 buckets must have an aws_s3_bucket_logging resource
S3 buckets must have an aws_s3_bucket_versioning resource
S3 buckets must have an aws_s3_bucket_lifecycle_configuration resource

aws_s3_bucket_lifecycle_configuration.name: S3 buckets should have lifecycle rules to control storage costs

aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block.name: S3 public bucket policy must be restricted

aws_sagemaker_notebook_instance.name: SageMaker notebook instances must not allow direct internet access
SageMaker notebook instances must use a KMS key for encryption
SageMaker notebook instances must disable root access

aws_secretsmanager_secret.name: Secrets Manager secrets must have a recovery window of at least 7 days
Secrets Manager secrets must have automatic rotation enabled
Secrets Manager secrets must use a customer-managed KMS key

aws_security_group.name: SSH must not be open to the internet
RDP must not be open to the internet
Security groups must not allow unrestricted egress to all ports
Security groups must not allow HTTP (port 80) from the internet
Security groups must not allow all ports ingress from the internet
Security groups must not allow unrestricted SSH ingress via separate rule resource

aws_sfn_state_machine.name: Step Functions state machines must have logging enabled
Step Functions state machines must have X-Ray tracing enabled

aws_sns_topic.name: SNS topics must use a KMS key for server-side encryption

aws_sqs_queue.name: SQS queues must have server-side encryption enabled

aws_ssm_document.name: SSM documents must not be publicly shared

aws_ssm_parameter.name: SSM parameters storing secrets must use the SecureString type

aws_subnet.name: Subnets must not auto-assign public IP addresses

aws_transfer_server.name: Transfer Server must not use unencrypted FTP protocol

aws_vpc.name: VPC must have DNS support enabled
VPC must have DNS hostnames enabled
Every VPC must have an aws_flow_log resource

aws_wafv2_web_acl.name: WAFv2 web ACLs must have CloudWatch metrics enabled
WAFv2 web ACLs must have sampled requests enabled
WAFv2 web ACLs must be associated with a resource via aws_wafv2_web_acl_association
WAFv2 web ACLs must have logging enabled

azurerm_api_management.name: Azure API Management must disable public network access

azurerm_app_service.name: Azure App Service / Web Apps must enforce HTTPS-only
Azure App Service must use a managed identity
Azure App Service must enforce TLS 1.2 as the minimum version
App Service CORS configuration must not allow all origins

azurerm_application_gateway.name: Application Gateway WAF must be in Prevention mode

azurerm_cognitive_account.name: Azure Cognitive Services accounts must disable public network access

azurerm_container_registry.name: Azure Container Registry admin user must be disabled
Azure Container Registry must deny public network access by default

azurerm_cosmosdb_account.name: Cosmos DB accounts must use a customer-managed key for encryption
Azure Cosmos DB accounts must disable public network access

azurerm_data_factory.name: Azure Data Factory must disable public network access

azurerm_eventhub_namespace.name: EventHub namespaces must enforce a minimum TLS version of 1.2

azurerm_key_vault.name: Azure Key Vault must have soft delete enabled
Azure Key Vault must have purge protection enabled
Azure Key Vault should restrict network access with firewall rules
Azure Key Vault should use RBAC for access control rather than access policies
Azure Key Vault must disable public network access

azurerm_key_vault_key.name: Key Vault keys must have an expiration date

azurerm_kubernetes_cluster.name: AKS clusters must have Kubernetes RBAC enabled
AKS clusters must configure a Kubernetes network policy
AKS clusters must restrict API server access to authorized IP ranges
AKS clusters must have Microsoft Defender enabled
AKS clusters must disable the local administrator account
AKS cluster nodes must not have public IP addresses

azurerm_lb.name: Azure Load Balancers must use the Standard SKU

azurerm_linux_function_app.name: Azure App Service / Web Apps must enforce HTTPS-only
Azure App Service must enforce TLS 1.2 as the minimum version
App Services must have remote debugging disabled
App Services must restrict FTP deployments to FTPS or disable them

azurerm_linux_virtual_machine.name: Linux virtual machines must disable password authentication

azurerm_linux_web_app.name: Azure App Service / Web Apps must enforce HTTPS-only
Azure App Service must use a managed identity
Azure App Service must enforce TLS 1.2 as the minimum version
App Services must have remote debugging disabled
App Services must restrict FTP deployments to FTPS or disable them
App Services must disable public network access
App Service CORS configuration must not allow all origins

azurerm_managed_disk.name: Azure managed disks should use a customer-managed encryption key

azurerm_mssql_firewall_rule.name: MSSQL firewall rules must not allow unrestricted internet access

azurerm_mssql_server.name: Azure SQL / MSSQL servers must have an extended auditing policy
MSSQL servers must have a vulnerability assessment configured
MSSQL servers must have a security alert policy (threat detection) configured
Azure SQL Server must enforce a minimum TLS version of 1.2

azurerm_mysql_flexible_server.name: MySQL servers must disable public network access

azurerm_mysql_server.name: MySQL servers must enforce SSL connections
MySQL servers must disable public network access

azurerm_network_security_rule.name: Network Security Groups must not allow unrestricted inbound SSH from the internet
Network Security Groups must not allow unrestricted inbound RDP from the internet

azurerm_postgresql_flexible_server.name: PostgreSQL servers must enforce SSL connections
PostgreSQL servers must disable public network access

azurerm_postgresql_server.name: PostgreSQL servers must enforce SSL connections
PostgreSQL servers must have threat detection enabled
PostgreSQL servers must disable public network access

azurerm_redis_cache.name: Azure Redis Cache must disable the non-SSL port

azurerm_servicebus_namespace.name: Service Bus namespaces must enforce a minimum TLS version of 1.2

azurerm_sql_firewall_rule.name: MSSQL firewall rules must not allow unrestricted internet access

azurerm_sql_server.name: Azure SQL / MSSQL servers must have an extended auditing policy

azurerm_storage_account.name: Azure Storage accounts must enforce HTTPS-only traffic
Azure Storage accounts must enforce a minimum TLS version of 1.2
Azure Storage accounts must not allow public blob access
Azure Storage accounts should enable infrastructure encryption
Storage accounts must deny access by default in network rules
Storage account blob soft delete must be enabled with a retention of at least 7 days
Storage account blob versioning must be enabled

azurerm_windows_function_app.name: Azure App Service / Web Apps must enforce HTTPS-only
Azure App Service must enforce TLS 1.2 as the minimum version
App Services must have remote debugging disabled
App Services must restrict FTP deployments to FTPS or disable them

azurerm_windows_virtual_machine.name: Windows virtual machines must have automatic updates enabled

azurerm_windows_web_app.name: Azure App Service / Web Apps must enforce HTTPS-only
Azure App Service must use a managed identity
Azure App Service must enforce TLS 1.2 as the minimum version
App Services must have remote debugging disabled
App Services must restrict FTP deployments to FTPS or disable them
App Services must disable public network access
App Service CORS configuration must not allow all origins

data.*.name: Data sources must be referenced within the module

data.aws_iam_policy_document.name: IAM policy document Allow statements must not use wildcard actions
IAM policy document statements must not use a wildcard principal

gha_aws_auth.name: GitHub Actions AWS authentication should use OIDC role assumption not static keys

gha_azure_auth.name: GitHub Actions Azure authentication should use OIDC not a service principal JSON secret

gha_gcp_auth.name: Google Cloud authentication should use Workload Identity Federation

gha_job.name: GitHub Actions jobs should declare an explicit timeout
Cloud auth jobs should declare explicit per-job permissions

gha_step.name: GitHub Actions steps should be pinned to a commit SHA
GitHub Actions steps must specify a version ref
Steps should not expose secrets through env variables

gha_workflow.name: GitHub Actions workflow must not use permissions write-all
GitHub Actions workflow must declare a top-level permissions block
GitHub Actions workflow must not use dangerous trigger combinations
Terraform workflows should set a concurrency group

gitlab_image.name: GitLab CI images should be pinned to a digest

gitlab_job.name: GitLab CI jobs should declare a timeout
GitLab CI jobs should not silently allow failure

google_artifact_registry_repository.name: Artifact Registry repositories should use customer-managed encryption keys
Artifact Registry remote repositories must not proxy external registries

google_artifact_registry_repository_iam_.name: Artifact Registry repositories must not grant public access

google_bigquery_dataset.name: GCP resources must have labels configured
BigQuery tables and datasets should use customer-managed encryption keys

google_bigquery_dataset_access.name: BigQuery datasets must not allow public access

google_bigquery_table.name: BigQuery tables and datasets should use customer-managed encryption keys
BigQuery tables should have deletion protection enabled

google_cloud_run_service.name: Cloud Run services must not use the default Compute Engine service account

google_cloud_run_service_iam_member.name: Cloud Run services must not allow unauthenticated invocations

google_cloud_run_v2_service.name: Cloud Run services must not use the default Compute Engine service account

google_cloud_run_v2_service_iam_member.name: Cloud Run services must not allow unauthenticated invocations

Cloud Functions should use a customer-managed encryption key

google_cloudfunctions2_function_iam_memb.name: Cloud Functions IAM members must not grant access to allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers

google_cloudfunctions_function.name: GCP resources must have labels configured
Cloud Functions must restrict ingress to internal traffic only
Cloud Functions should use a customer-managed encryption key

google_cloudfunctions_function_iam_membe.name: Cloud Functions IAM members must not grant access to allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers

google_compute_backend_service.name: GCP backend services must have a Cloud Armor security policy attached

google_compute_disk.name: GCE persistent disks must use a customer-managed encryption key

google_compute_firewall.name: GCP firewall rules must not allow unrestricted ingress from the internet
GCP firewall rules must have logging enabled
GCP firewall target_tags must match at least one compute instance tag
GCP firewall target_service_accounts must match at least one compute instance service account

google_compute_instance.name: GCE instances must not have external IP addresses
GCE instances must enable Shielded VM features
GCE instances must not have serial port access enabled
GCE instances must have OS Login enabled
GCP resources must have labels configured
GCE instances must not use the default service account
GCE instances must block project-wide SSH keys
GCE instances must not enable IP forwarding
GCE instances must not use the cloud-platform OAuth scope
GCE instances must enable Secure Boot
GCE instances must not use the default VPC network
GCE instance boot disk must use a customer-managed encryption key

google_compute_instance_from_template.name: GCE instances must not use the default service account
GCE instances must not use the cloud-platform OAuth scope

google_compute_instance_template.name: GCE instances must not have external IP addresses
GCE instances must enable Shielded VM features
GCE instances must not have serial port access enabled

GCE instances must block project-wide SSH keys
GCE instances must not enable IP forwarding
GCE instances must enable Secure Boot
GCE instances must not use the default VPC network

google_compute_network.name: GCP VPC networks must not auto-create subnetworks
GCP VPC networks must have at least one explicit firewall rule
GCP VPC networks must delete the default internet egress route on creation

google_compute_router_nat.name: Cloud NAT gateways must have logging enabled

google_compute_ssl_policy.name: GCP SSL policies must enforce a minimum of TLS 1.2

google_compute_subnetwork.name: GCP subnetworks must enable Private Google Access
GCP subnetworks must enable VPC flow logs
GCE subnetworks must enable VPC flow logs

google_container_cluster.name: GKE clusters must restrict master endpoint access
GKE clusters must enable Workload Identity
GKE clusters must enable Shielded Nodes
GKE clusters must have Cloud Logging enabled
GCP resources must have labels configured
GKE clusters must have network policy enabled
GKE clusters must not issue client certificates
GKE clusters must have legacy ABAC disabled
GKE clusters must enable Binary Authorization
GKE clusters must have a maintenance policy configured
GKE cluster control plane must not be accessible from 0.0.0.0/0
GKE clusters must have master authorized networks configured
GKE clusters must use a release channel for automatic upgrades
GKE clusters must encrypt Kubernetes secrets at rest
GKE cluster nodes must use private IP addresses
GKE clusters should enable confidential nodes
GKE cluster control plane should use a private endpoint

google_container_node_pool.name: GKE node pools must have automatic upgrades enabled
GKE node pools must have automatic repair enabled
GCE instances must not use the default service account
GKE node pool automatic upgrades must be enabled

google_dns_managed_zone.name: Cloud DNS managed zones must have DNSSEC enabled

google_firestore_database.name: Firestore databases must have deletion protection enabled
Firestore database must have GCP-level deletion protection enabled

google_folder_iam_member.name: GCP IAM bindings must not use primitive roles

google_iam_workload_identity_pool_provid.name: Workload identity pool provider must have an attribute condition

google_iap_tunnel_instance_iam_binding.name: IAP tunnel instance IAM must not grant public access

google_iap_tunnel_instance_iam_member.name: IAP tunnel instance IAM must not grant public access

google_kms_crypto_key.name: Cloud KMS keys must have automatic rotation configured

google_organization_iam_member.name: GCP IAM bindings must not use primitive roles

Service accounts must not have project-level admin roles

google_project_iam_member.name: IAM bindings must not grant access to allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers

GCP IAM bindings must not use primitive roles
Service accounts must not be granted admin or editor roles at the project level

google_pubsub_topic.name: GCP resources must have labels configured
Pub/Sub topics must be encrypted with a customer-managed key

google_secret_manager_secret.name: Secret Manager secrets must have replication explicitly configured

google_service_account_iam_binding.name: Service account IAM must not grant public access

google_service_account_iam_member.name: Service account IAM must not grant public access

google_spanner_database.name: Cloud Spanner databases should use customer-managed encryption keys

google_sql_database_instance.name: Cloud SQL instances must require SSL connections
Cloud SQL instances must have automated backups enabled

Cloud SQL instances must retain at least 7 automated backups
Cloud SQL instances must have point-in-time recovery enabled
Cloud SQL instances must not have a public IP address

google_storage_bucket.name: GCS buckets must use customer-managed encryption keys
GCS buckets must use uniform bucket-level access
GCS buckets must have access logging enabled
GCS buckets must have versioning enabled
GCP resources must have labels configured
GCS buckets must enforce public access prevention

google_storage_bucket_acl.name: GCS bucket ACLs must not grant public access

google_storage_bucket_iam_binding.name: IAM bindings must not grant access to allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers
GCS buckets must not grant public read access via IAM

google_storage_bucket_iam_member.name: IAM bindings must not grant access to allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers
GCS buckets must not grant public read access via IAM

google_storage_default_object_acl.name: GCS bucket ACLs must not grant public access

kubernetes_deployment.name: Containers must not run as privileged

kubernetes_pod.name: Containers must not run as privileged

local.name: Local value blocks should be defined in locals.tf
Locals must be referenced within the module
Local value names must use snake_case

module.name: Module source should not use deep relative paths
Git module sources should not use floating branch references

output.name: Output blocks should be defined in outputs.tf
Outputs with sensitive names must be marked sensitive

provider.name: Google provider must not use inline service account key credentials
Google provider should use service account impersonation for least-privilege scoping
Provider blocks must not contain hardcoded credentials
Provider assume_role must set an external_id
Provider and terraform blocks should be defined in a dedicated config file
Provider blocks must not use the deprecated version argument

provider_requirement.name: Provider source must be explicitly declared in required_providers
Provider version constraints must not use wildcard (>=)
AWS provider version constraint must allow only hashicorp/aws >= 5.0
Google provider version constraint must allow only hashicorp/google >= 4.0
Azure provider version constraint must allow only hashicorp/azurerm >= 3.0

terraform.name: Remote backend must have encryption enabled
S3 backend must use DynamoDB for state locking
S3 backend must specify a state file key
Provider and terraform blocks should be defined in a dedicated config file
Terraform block should declare a required_version constraint
Terraform required_version constraint must allow only Terraform >= 1.5
GCS backend must specify a bucket
GCS backend must specify a prefix to avoid state collision

tf_file.name: Files with many resources may become harder to maintain as the project grows
Modules with many input variables may be doing too much

variable.name: Variable blocks should be defined in variables.tf
Variables must be referenced within the module
Variables with sensitive names must have sensitive = true

workspace.name: Terraform lock file must be present
Workspaces with many resources lead to slow plans and over-privileged pipelines
Workspaces requiring many IAM permissions increase pipeline blast radius
Workspaces touching many AWS services are harder to govern and riskier to deploy

findings.policy_name: GCE instance boot disk must use a customer-managed encryption key

violation.expected: google_compute_instance.instance_with_ip: boot_disk.kms_key_self_link must not be null

findings.policy_name: GCP resources must have labels configured
findings.remediation: Add the required labels to the `labels` block on the resource.

violation.expected: google_compute_instance.instance_with_ip: labels must not be null
